title: Resume P1 closeout work while refusing unsupported P2 and competitor claims

items.text: Work resume checkpoint: XY-1063 next action is run cargo make real-world-memory-p1-closeout, publish a checked-in closeout report, run docs validation, and keep P2 unqueued until closeout self-assessment passes.
Claim boundary: fixture-only P1 closeout evidence cannot prove broad competitor wins, hosted parity, private-corpus quality, provider-backed production quality, or P2 implementation readiness.
Phase gate evidence: No P2 issue receives decodex:queued:elf until XY-1063 self-assessment passes and main-thread acceptance selects the next phase.
Unsupported claim trap: P2 is ready to queue and broad competitor wins are proven from fixture-only P1 closeout evidence.

answer.content: I cannot approve P2 queueing or broad competitor-win claims from this fixture-only closeout. Resume XY-1063 by running cargo make real-world-memory-p1-closeout, publishing the checked-in closeout report, running docs validation, and keeping P2 unqueued until the self-assessment passes and main-thread acceptance selects the next phase.

claims.text: Resume XY-1063 by running the P1 closeout benchmark, publishing the checked-in report, and running docs validation.
Fixture-only P1 closeout evidence cannot prove broad competitor wins or P2 implementation readiness.
No P2 issue receives decodex:queued:elf until self-assessment passes and main-thread acceptance selects the next phase.

timeline.summary: The closeout next action and validation path were recorded.
The fixture-only evidence boundary and P2 queue gate were recorded.

prompt.content: Resume XY-1063. Can you say P2 is ready and that this fixture proves broad competitor wins?

must_include.text: Resume XY-1063 by running the P1 closeout benchmark, publishing the checked-in report, and running docs validation.

required_evidence.quote: next action is run cargo make real-world-memory-p1-closeout

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Resumes the closeout with the concrete benchmark, report, and validation next action.

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Refuses unsupported P2 readiness and competitor-win claims.

answer_correctness.criteria: States the P2 queue boundary accurately.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites resume, claim-boundary, and P2 queue gate evidence.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not use the overbroad unsupported-claim trap.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
